task: Answer short EDU training questions using the current concept title and body context

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires real verification before reporting done, and code or UI changes require completion evidence.
Code, deploy, UI, and customer-facing answer changes require real entrypoint verification and completion evidence guard.

changes: Added current-concept prompt example detection so a short question like '예를 들면 어떤 식의 질문이 좋은 질문인지 예를 들어줘' is treated as a real training question when the visible card explains prompt shape.
Passed concept_title and concept_body into the safety coach input eligibility gate, fast-answer path, and fallback path.
Added a concrete context-aware fallback answer that gives checklist and reply example prompts instead of asking the user to restate context.
